chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1303/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on Misc. No.6104/2024 2. For order on Misc. No.6105/2024 3. For hearing of main case. 15.03.2024 Petitioner in person................ 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. This petition pertains to provision of SSGC gas connections to petitioner and other inhabitants of same locality. Earlier to this petition, petitioner filed CP No.D-5320/2023 that was decided by order dated 03.11.2023 whereby directions were given to the Wafaqi Muhtasib for decision on the complaint of petitioner. However order passed by Wafaqi Muhtasib reflects that complainant failed to pursue the remedy. Paragraph No.3 being relevant is reproduced herewith:- “These complaints was investigated to determine Agency’s mal-administration as per article 2 of President’s Order No.1 of 1983 and concluded in its final hearing held on 01.11.2023. The complainants remained absent on all dates of hearing despite notices, SMS & calls. The representative of the Agency was present & reiterated her earlier stand and assured that under process work will be completed on priority basis.” Accordingly, petitioner has right to file fresh complaint before Wafaqi Muhtasib or he may challenge the order before appropriate forum; hence this petition is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E IK
